_comment: Legit primitive nodes (INVARIANT 1, verdict PASS_PRIMITIVE_EXCEPTION). These are visual primitives that intentionally are NOT SAP kit instances — no kit component exists for them, or they are pure decoration. A node PASSES as a primitive only if its NAME matches one of namePatterns AND its type is in the allowed types for that pattern. This list is deliberately small; adding to it requires a documented reason.

primitives.reason: 1px separator line — no SAP kit component; must still carry a [sapToken] bound fill (sapList_BorderColor)
Icon placeholder — swapped to a real SAP icon by the plugin Bind step
Canonical Progress Row uses a native green frame (40x12, radius 6) — confirmed better than the SAP ProgressIndicator composite (see figma-build-patterns.md)
Confirmation success circle — decorative shape holding an icon placeholder; carries a [sapPositiveElementColor] bound fill
Prototype DEMO pill — a build-time marker, not part of the SAP screen; stripped before delivery
Raster image fill — no SAP component
